---
title: "All agreements"
---

```{r}
source("scripts/site_helpers.R")
agreements <- read_data("agreements.csv")
```

Every transformative agreement in which at least one TU9 university takes
part. One row per agreement and relationship (sub-package); the `TU9 members`
column shows which institutions participate. In total, **`r nrow(agreements)`**
agreement records are listed.

```{r}
updated_stamp()
```

Download this data as CSV: [`agreements.csv`](agreements.csv).

```{r}
agreements_table(agreements)
```
